messages.subject: [R-jobs] EpiX Analytics - Consultant Position
messages.body_plain:
Consultant - Decision and risk analysis applied to infectious diseases and animal health

APPLICATIONS RECEIVED UNTIL JULY 21, 2020
Location: Fort Collins, CO (physical presence strongly preferred)
Position type: Full time
Apply at: https://www.epixanalytics.com/join-our-team.html

EpiX analytics is a consulting and research firm specialized in risk and decision modeling. We are seeking a full-time Consultant, to contribute to a variety of quantitative risk and decision analysis projects. The candidate will initially focus (for at least one year) on projects related to animal health, infectious diseases, and biosecurity. During this period there will also be opportunities to get involved in other projects related to EpiX's diversified portfolio at https://www.epixanalytics.com/clients-of-epix-analytics.html.





	[[alternative HTML version deleted]]

messages.subject: [R-jobs] EpiX Analytics - Scientist Position
messages.body_plain:
Scientist - Decision and risk analysis applied to antimicrobial resistance

APPLICATIONS RECEIVED UNTIL JULY 21, 2020
Location: Fort Collins, CO (physical presence strongly preferred)
Position type: Two-year full time (potential for longer-term)
Apply at: https://www.epixanalytics.com/join-our-team.html

EpiX analytics is a consulting and research firm specialized in risk and decision modeling.  We are seeking a full-time Scientist. For the first two years, the candidate will focus on projects related to antimicrobial resistance (AMR), human and animal health, infectious disease, and food safety. Because results from the AMR-related projects are expected to be published in peer-reviewed journals, the position can potentially be considered a post-doc position. The candidate will be able to pursue additional funding to continue working on AMR after the initial two year period, or opt to transition to a role that might involve consulting as related to EpiX's diversified portfolio at https://www.epixanalytics.com/clients-of-epix-analytics.html.






	[[alternative HTML version deleted]]
